talks.title: Event Welcome
talks.description: Opening of the @Scale Systems & Reliability 2026 conference.

talks.title: Keynote from Meta
talks.description: Vice President of Engineering for Core Infrastructure at Meta presents the latest progress on infrastructure for AI through agentic innovation, spanning custom silicon, networking fabrics, and AI-driven system management.

talks.title: Our Journey to Safely Unleash Agents at Meta Scale
talks.description: Explores enabling agentic access to Meta systems safely, covering internal agents, third-party agent deployment, and the guardrails required to prevent destructive actions while granting agents real capability.

talks.title: The Agentic Infrastructure Gap: In-Distribution Languages Make It a Coding Problem
talks.description: Argues that LLMs can manage infrastructure through general-purpose programming languages rather than bespoke DSLs, and discusses reliably mapping code changes to infrastructure outcomes.

talks.title: Extending Meta to the Public Cloud
talks.description: Details Meta's integration of public cloud resources with internal infrastructure, focusing on multi-cloud optionality, GPU capacity management, and fleet management across environments.

talks.title: Live Q&A
talks.description: Live audience Q&A on safely unleashing agents, agentic infrastructure, and extending Meta to the public cloud.

talks.title: Teaching AI to Fight Fires: Autonomous Reliability Agents at Meta Scale
talks.description: Describes a reliability flywheel that encodes on-call engineer investigation methods into an autonomous agent. The agent handled 1,000+ incidents with a 60% improvement in detection-to-mitigation time and matched senior engineer performance roughly 80% of the time, covering pattern identification, autonomous investigation, supervised mitigation, and self-healing goals.

talks.title: Experience Productionizing and Operating GB200 Clusters
talks.description: Covers the NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 system, an exascale computer within a single rack, including topology-aware scheduling, GPU occupancy optimization, and cluster operations at scale.

talks.title: Building Privacy Aware Infrastructure in the AI-Native Era
talks.description: Presents an AI-native asset classification approach combining deterministic rules with an LLM fallback, discussing ground-truth improvement loops, active learning, LLM-as-Judge evaluation, and distilling LLM behavior into auditable rules.

talks.title: AI Storage Blueprint
talks.description: Details the evolution of Meta's storage architecture to optimize GPU utilization and research velocity, addressing rapid growth in model capabilities and dataset sizes.

talks.title: Live Panel
talks.description: Live panel discussion on systems and reliability for AI infrastructure.

talks.title: Keynote from Meta
talks.description: Meta's Head of Production Engineering presents on infrastructure for AI through agentic innovation and the future of autonomous reliability.

talks.title: [Almost] Fail & Tell: Stop The World
talks.description: Documents a March 2025 incident where Meta avoided a major outage by re-bootstrapping the infrastructure control plane in an entire region within minutes using emergency tooling.

talks.title: Securing Production Debugging at Hyperscale
talks.description: Examines Microsoft's SSH debugging across global Kubernetes cluster fleets, integrating just-in-time elevations and task-based execution with AI and Semantic Kernel for on-call problem resolution.

talks.title: Taming AI Infrastructure Failures with Agentic Debugging
talks.description: Addresses NCCL watchdog timeouts in distributed training, describing investigation across Meta's recommendation systems, categorization of root causes, and agent-based debugging approaches.
